title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear girl and boy talking about the school trip.
items.audio_script: Girl: Hi, Harry. I’m checking the plan for the school trip. I thought we were going to meet outside the library, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Boy: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]We have to meet by the sports hall at half past eight[/1]. || Girl: Good thing I asked. I nearly waited near the classroom. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Boy: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Hi, Harry. I’m checking the plan for the school trip. I thought we were going to meet outside the library, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. We have to meet by the sports hall at half past eight.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly waited near the classroom. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.question: Where should they meet?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, outside a school library, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, beside a school sports hall entrance, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, outside a classroom door, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “We have to meet by the sports hall at half past eight.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear mum and dad talking about the dentist appointment.
items.audio_script: Mum: Hi, Mia. I’m checking the plan for the dentist appointment. I thought we were going to arrive at ten o’clock, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Dad: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The appointment is at half past ten, but we should leave earlier[/1]. || Mum: Good thing I asked. I nearly got there much too early. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Dad: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.context: You hear woman and man talking about getting to town.
items.audio_script: Woman: Hi, Lucy. I’m checking the plan for getting to town. I thought we were going to take the bus, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Man: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The train is quicker today because the roads are busy[/1]. || Woman: Good thing I asked. I nearly stood at the bus stop. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Man: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.context: You hear man and woman talking about a present for Mum.
